name: I work with ethylene oxide at sterilization plant in West Valley—covered by workers comp?
description: Yes, file workers' comp for EtO-related health issues.

mainEntity.name: I work with ethylene oxide at sterilization plant in West Valley—covered by workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, file workers' comp for EtO-related health issues.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, EtO exposure qualifies as occupational injury under workers' comp in Utah.** EtO is a known carcinogen; claims cover related cancers/illnesses if work-linked.[1][2][3] Key factors: 1+ year exposure, medical diagnosis (e.g., lymphoma), monitoring data. Collect air samples, training records; third-party suits possible vs. manufacturers. Specialized lawyers handle EtO multidistrict litigation alongside comp.
